question: What are the population, name and leader of the country with the largest area?
gold_sql: SELECT Name ,  population ,  HeadOfState FROM country ORDER BY SurfaceArea DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT population, name, headofstate FROM country ORDER BY surfacearea DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT population, name, headofstate FROM country ORDER BY surfacearea DESC LIMIT 1;
